quotes.text: The app is crashing today sir . Despite logging through mobile verification, it is automatically getting logged out even after catching otp
• Best for Beginners: "Trading ke liye sabse simple aur clean interface." • Smooth Experience: "Stock aur Mutual Funds ke liye ek dum badhiya app."
Excellent application. unfortunately I closed my trading account. Now I want to reopen my trading account. But there are no option to reopen

action_ideas: Review and optimize fee structures, clearly communicating value to reduce negative sentiment.
Implement a clear, accessible process for users to reopen closed trading accounts.
Prioritize fixing app crashes and login issues to ensure a stable and reliable user experience.
